_meta.description: Mneme Ship Design System — Avionics Component Catalog. Avionics are Level-2 components that attach to Structures. They consume power and provide guidance, navigation, control, telemetry, and sensing capabilities.
_meta.notes: Each avionics generation spans ~5 years (0.1 TL). Later generations are lighter, cheaper per capability, and more reliable. Power consumption is baseline; actual draw varies with mission phase.

avionics.name: Analog Radio-Inertial Guidance
avionics.notes: Vacuum tube-based analog computers. Mechanical gyroscopic platforms. Radio command override from ground. Basis: V-2 guidance, early R-7 system.

avionics.name: Transistor Inertial Platform
avionics.notes: First transistorized guidance. Strapdown inertial platforms with float gyroscopes. Basis: Atlas LV-3B guidance, Vostok system.

avionics.name: Digital Discrete-Logic Guidance
avionics.notes: Discrete IC logic. Apollo Guidance Computer (AGC) class. DSKY interface. Basis: AGC, Gemini guidance.

avionics.name: Integrated-Circuit Flight Computer
avionics.notes: First IC-based space computers. Strapdown IMU replaces gimbaled platforms for some applications. Basis: Saturn V IU, early Shuttle GNC.

avionics.name: Microprocessor Flight Controller
avionics.notes: First microprocessors in spaceflight. Software-upgradable guidance. Basis: Viking lander computer, early Delta guidance.

avionics.name: Redundant Digital Flight System
avionics.notes: Space Shuttle-class avionics. Four redundant general-purpose computers. First glass cockpit. Basis: Shuttle GPC, AP-101.

avionics.name: VLSI Integrated Avionics
avionics.notes: Very Large Scale Integration. Solid-state memory replaces core. GPS receiver design begins. Basis: Ariane 4 GNC, Delta II guidance.

avionics.name: Commercial-Grade Space Avionics
avionics.notes: Radiation-hardened COTS processors. MIL-STD-1553 data bus. First operational GPS receivers in space. Basis: Hubble DF-224, early GPS receivers.

avionics.name: GPS-Navigated Flight System
avionics.notes: GPS becomes primary navigation aid. Fiber optic gyroscopes. Solid-state recorders. Basis: Delta III, Atlas III, ISS GNC.

avionics.name: Network-Centric Avionics
avionics.notes: Ethernet and TCP/IP in space. Distributed computing across multiple processors. GLONASS integration. Basis: Sea Launch, early Ariane 5.

avionics.name: FPGA-Based Reconfigurable GNC
avionics.notes: FPGAs for reconfigurable flight control. System-on-chip integration. Software-defined radio. Galileo design. Basis: Falcon 1 avionics, SMART-1.

avionics.name: NewSpace Minimal Avionics
avionics.notes: Radiation-tolerant (not fully hardened) COTS. Linux-based flight software. Modular card-based avionics. Triple-GNSS. Basis: SpaceX Dragon (early), Antares.

avionics.name: Autonomous Landing Vision System
avionics.notes: Vision-based navigation for landing. LiDAR altimetry. Autonomous guidance without ground contact. Basis: Grasshopper, Falcon 9 landing GNC, MSL sky crane.

avionics.name: Reuse-Optimized Fleet Avionics
avionics.notes: Designed for rapid turnaround. Predictive maintenance algorithms. Fleet-wide software updates. ML-assisted trajectory optimization. Basis: Falcon 9 Block 5, Electron.

avionics.name: Crew-Rated Touchscreen Avionics
avionics.notes: Human-rated with touchscreen interfaces. Voice control. AI copilot for anomaly detection. Real-time physics simulation for crew training. Basis: Crew Dragon, Starliner, Orion.

avionics.name: Lunar Terrain-Relative Navigation
avionics.notes: Precision landing on unprepared lunar terrain using orbital maps. Optical communications for high-bandwidth telemetry. Lunar beacon network for positioning. Basis: Artemis HLS, Blue Moon.

avionics.name: Orbital Depot Operations Controller
avionics.notes: Fully autonomous rendezvous and docking without ground control. Propellant transfer sequencing. Multi-vehicle formation flying. Basis: Orbital propellant depot concepts.

avionics.name: Deep Space AI Mission Planner
avionics.notes: Onboard AI plans mission segments autonomously. Self-diagnosing fault recovery. Coordinates distributed satellite constellations. Basis: NASA ACIP concepts.

avionics.name: Nuclear Thermal Control System
avionics.notes: Controls nuclear thermal reactor startup, throttle, and shutdown. Plasma diagnostics for magnetic nozzle operation. Heavy radiation hardening. Basis: NERVA-derived concepts, Project Timberwind.

avionics.name: Quantum Inertial Navigation
avionics.notes: Cold atom interferometry for drift-free inertial navigation. Quantum-enhanced positioning without external references. Basis: DARPA ACE, ESA Q-Cube concepts.

avionics.name: Fusion Drive Control Core
avionics.notes: Real-time magnetic confinement field control for fusion propulsion. Plasma injection sequencing at microsecond precision. Relativistic navigation for high-delta-V missions. Basis: Daedalus, ICF propulsion studies.
